{{CargoClone
|name=General Lu Bu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=171
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=For Round 1, DMG +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=For Round 1, DMG +2.5%
|}}
